name: GENTOR RESOURCES INC.
business: Gentor Resources is an exploration stage company engaged in the search for mineral deposits, particularly copper, gold, molybdenum and nickel. It acquires and develops mineral properties and aims to create value by optioning or selling projects to larger companies. The company currently has projects in Idaho (molybdenum-tungsten) and Oman (copper and gold).

exposures.sentence: Our corporate strategy is to create shareholder value by acquiring and developing highly prospective mineral properties.

catalysts.event: Received $4,615,001 from sale of equity securities
catalysts.sentence: on February 10, 2011, the Company received an additional $4,615,001 from the sale of its equity securities.
